meta.doc: Catalog v6.0 = multi-generation extension of v5.0 (which was 'V2' enriched from V9 gaps). Hardcoded generation transitions for 101 (brand, model_family) combinations covering top European market models. Each entry now represents a (brand × model_family × generation) with its specific engine lineup observed in V9 + linked mfr_specs_v2 engines for current generations only. Models without hardcoded gens fall back to v2 catalog entries (treated as single-generation 'current').
